note: Direct-write by Alice. No Notion dependency. Updated every turn-close push.

notes.title: archive_block op added to notion-ops
notes.decisions: Added archive_block op — PATCH /blocks/{id} with archived:true; unarchive boolean supported.
notes.open_questions: Should we add a dedicated archive_database alias op for clarity?

notes.title: Turn-level brain push mandate wired
notes.decisions: Every Alice turn ends with brain update as part of push_files. Minimum viable note = title+date+source+cid.
notes.open_questions: Bob and Charlie Space instructions need same mandate.

notes.title: gitzip hardening + Agent Notes DB live
notes.decisions: Hardened gitzip-push. Added create_database, append_row, append_note to notion-ops. Agent Notes DB provisioned.
notes.open_questions: When to build brain.json read primitive?

notes.title: AFO generator Phase 1-5 complete — Deployment Pack v1 shipped
notes.decisions: All 5 generator phases complete. Deployment Pack v1 live at docs/deployment-pack-v1.md. comparisons.md edits applied.
notes.open_questions: 3 hard gates remain before TrueBuild launch: DNS, form URL, content approval.

notes.title: TrueBuild demo job generated and approved
notes.decisions: G-001 v1.1 generated TrueBuild demo job (10 files). Jared approved: 'It's incredible. Very solid product.' job.json status set to approved.
notes.open_questions: Install on live domain or second demo job first?

notes.title: G-000 v1.4 — brainstorm auto-loads handoff on boot
notes.decisions: handoff.md added as brainstorm boot step 3. Bulletins reframed as session discussion topics, not orientation context.

notes.title: AFO-first pivot — Launch Plan v2 live
notes.decisions: AFO dogfoods first. TrueBuild is Customer #2. Full runbook + 4 monitoring templates pushed. Honesty principle: no guaranteed ranking claims.
notes.open_questions: Run baseline LLM test before ANY AFO files touch the domain.

notes.title: AFO v1 signup flow — Worker, D1, /start page, checklist
notes.decisions: Full v1 signup flow built. POST /api/audit-signup. Coupons: AFO-FOUNDER, AFO-DOGFOOD. No payment required.
notes.open_questions: Admin dashboard for D1? Alice sweep of GitHub issues → job.json? SERVICES_LIST bug fix?

notes.title: D1 afo-v1 database created by Jared
notes.decisions: Jared created D1 'afo-v1' from iPhone. UUID: ccbd076e-aaa7-42bb-88... Tables: 0, migration not yet run.
notes.open_questions: Paste full UUID into wrangler.toml, run migration, confirm Tables → 3.

notes.title: brain.json direct-write pattern implemented — G-000 v2.0
notes.decisions: Removed Notion/append_note dependency. Alice writes brain.json directly in every turn-close push_files. Notion UI can be re-wired later.

notes.title: System context: multi-account multi-provider coordination
notes.decisions: Jared runs: 2 paid Perplexity accounts with multiple Spaces (Alice, alice-ops, alice-review, etc.) + 1 paid ChatGPT account (Brainstorm / G-001). All coordinated via GitHub as the shared state layer. GitHub repo is the only source of truth that all providers can read.
notes.open_questions: As the system scales, should each provider/account have a clear role boundary doc so new sessions always know which provider handles what?
